docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WICKENS, ANDREW ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WICKENS, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRIMES, BOB $290.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $290.00, JUDGMENT IS IN ADDITION TO THE AMOUNT ($905.00) WAS HAS BEEN REFUNDED TO THE PLAINTIFF. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-16-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRIMES, BOB
